original_proposal: Use the latest complete GEFS 00 UTC cycle available before the decision time
direct_evidence: GEFS runs 00/06/12/18 UTC with 31 members; project has dates but no decision time or timezone; p30/f180 on all 10 project dates was available about 5.028-5.079 h after initialization
revised_protocol: Set decision time to 06:00 local; use same-date 00 UTC only when all 31 members, required variables, and f003-f180 are present
main_consequence: Prevents look-ahead but requires explicit timezone and completeness manifest

original_proposal: Use the daily weather ensemble mean as the first model input; retain spread only for audit
direct_evidence: GEFS has 31 members; project paper-aligned code evaluates members separately and averages member decisions; nonlinear weather-response means model(mean weather) is not equal to mean model response
revised_protocol: Keep 31 members as separate scenarios; primary decision maximizes mean predicted gain; retain paper-aligned mean of member-optimal irrigation and mean-weather input as baselines
main_consequence: More inference rows but little surrogate cost; preserves uncertainty and avoids synthetic mean-weather trajectories

original_proposal: Map the seven-day window to each site's local dates D through D+6
direct_evidence: Project site tables contain longitude/latitude but no IANA timezone; GEFS selected products are 3-hourly through f240; local-midnight boundaries may not align with 3-hour UTC intervals
revised_protocol: Add IANA timezone; fetch through f180; map instantaneous fields by local valid time and allocate interval sums by overlap with local calendar days
main_consequence: Adds a documented within-interval allocation assumption and prevents UTC/local date shifts

original_proposal: Difference every adjacent accumulated-precipitation lead and sum by local date
direct_evidence: Official 2024 indices show f003=0-3 h, f006=0-6 h, f009=6-9 h, f012=6-12 h; a blanket f009-f006 difference mixes different accumulation origins
revised_protocol: Parse GRIB startStep/endStep; reconstruct non-overlapping increments within each accumulation block; determine negative tolerance from packing precision
main_consequence: Avoids false negative or missing rainfall at six-hour reset boundaries

original_proposal: Fallback to the most recent prior cycle up to 24 h; otherwise drop the sample and never fill with actual weather
direct_evidence: NOAA Open Data exposes 2024 files, but NCEI states this channel is not an official archive; partial member mixing would destroy ensemble coherence
revised_protocol: Preflight the entire 31-member cycle; if any critical file is missing, fallback the whole ensemble to the previous 00 UTC cycle; otherwise exclude; snapshot paths, ETags/checksums, and subsets
main_consequence: Preserves one coherent initialization and reproducibility; may reduce sample count
